name: Max & Lucy's
tagline: The chef is also your server — weekday-only, sells out daily, and the lemon bars are famous.
mustOrder: prime rib — when available, don't hesitate
lemon bars — famous for a reason, grab one before they're gone
parking: Street parking on Halekauwila St; Kakaako side streets
talkStory: Run by Max and Lucy Bolosan — Max cooks everything himself and then personally walks each plate to your table. Named after the couple, operating from a tiny Kakaako kitchen since the mid-2000s, Mon-Fri 5am-2pm only. The lemon bars became so famous that people order trays for office parties island-wide. Max sources kalbi from a specific local supplier and marinates overnight. There's no website, no social media push — just three decades of Kakaako construction workers and office employees spreading the word.
